description: Short video inside our lab showing today's handwritten paper that says 'Northline Group' (北线集团). The single strongest proof we are a real, currently-operating lab — it shows a live, dated sign. Send when a prospect doubts we are a real lab, thinks it is a scam, or asks for live/current proof we exist.
Close-up video panning over trays of finished peptide vials. Best when a prospect wants to SEE the actual product or asks whether we really have the goods in stock.
Video of our lab/manufacturing equipment. Good extra proof we make the product in-house. Send if a prospect asks about our facility, how we make it, or whether we are really the manufacturer.

Photo of our warehouse floor with dozens of open boxes full of product being packed for shipment. Strong proof we are a real, high-volume operation with real inventory. Send when a prospect doubts we are legit, wants to see our operation, or asks if we really have the product in stock.
